title: wdrink/RepWAM
abstract:
Code for RepWAM: World Action Modeling with Representation Visual-Action Tokenizers

RepWAM: World Action Modeling with Representation Visual-Action Tokenizers Junke Wang 1    Qihang Zhang 2    Shuai Yang 2    Yiming Luo 2    Yujun Shen 2    Zuxuan Wu 1*    Yu-Gang Jiang 1*    Yinghao Xu 3,2* 1 Institute of Trustworthy Embodied AI, Fudan University    2 Robbyant, Ant Group 3 Hong Kong University of Science and Technology * Corresponding authors ## Introduction RepWAM is a representation-centric world action model, built around semantic visual-action tokenization. It first learns a visual-action tokenizer, and then trains a causal WAM to model future states and actions under language instructions, enabling effective transfer from world modeling to robot control. ## Highlights - ⛰️ RepWAM is the first representation-centric WAM trained on semantic visual and action latent tokens. - ⚡️ Our representation visual-action tokenizer, RepViTok, not only achieves superior visual reconstruction quality, but also transfers well to robot actions. - 🔥 Leading performance on real robot tasks and RoboTwin 2.0, showing clear gains over WAN2.2 VAE. ## Open-source Plan - [2026/06/12] ~~Paper release.~~ - [2026/06] Inference code and model weights release. ## Method ### Representation Visual-Action Tokenizer RepViTok first trains a video tokenizer with both pixel reconstruction and semantic alignment supervision. On top of the visual latent space, it then learns latent actions as compact transitions between visual states. ### World Action Model With the paired visual-action latents, RepWAM trains a causal diffusion transformer over visual-action chunks, jointly modeling future visual states and the latent actions that connect them under language conditioning. ## Results ### Real-world Manipulation We evaluate our model on a Franka dual-arm robot platform across three manipulation tasks, on which RepWAM consistently surpasses existing vision-language-action models and WAMs. Real-world rollou
abstract_zh: RepWAM是一种以表征为中心的世界动作模型，围绕语义视觉-动作分词构建。它首先学习一个视觉-动作分词器，然后训练一个因果WAM，在语言指令下建模未来状态和动作，实现从世界建模到机器人控制的有效迁移。我们的表征视觉-动作分词器RepViTok不仅实现了卓越的视觉重建质量，还能很好地迁移到机器人动作上。在真实机器人任务和RoboTwin 2.0上取得了领先性能，明显优于WAN2.2 VAE。
tldr_zh: 首个基于语义视觉-动作潜令牌的世界动作模型，在真实机器人任务上表现领先。
cover_zh: 机器人也能懂语义？这个新模型用视觉-动作分词器让世界建模直接起飞

judge.reason: 首个表示中心的世界动作模型，结合视觉-动作分词器，在真实机器人任务上领先。

>[!abstract] 一句话总结：提出RepWAM，先训练语义视觉-动作分词器RepViTok，再基于视觉-动作潜变量训练因果扩散Transformer联合建模未来状态和动作。


# 一、动机

> 现有世界动作模型缺乏高效的语义视觉-动作令牌化表示，导致在机器人控制任务中性能受限。


# 二、方法

> 提出RepWAM，先训练语义视觉-动作分词器RepViTok，再基于视觉-动作潜变量训练因果扩散Transformer联合建模未来状态和动作。


# 三、核心实验结果

> 在Franka双臂机器人平台上的三个真实操作任务中，RepWAM全面超越现有视觉-语言-动作模型和世界动作模型，并在RoboTwin 2.0基准上取得领先性能，优于WAN2.2 VAE。


# 四、对我的启发

> 与课题相关，该方法为机器人操作提供了有效的世界建模新范式。
